summary: Iteration 36 - MSG91 OTP Login Bug Fix Testing Complete. Tested the fix for OTP login flow where login wasn't completing after MSG91 verification. Backend API /api/admin/login-otp works correctly - returns success=true with role=admin for registered mobile 8877896889. Frontend UI has proper Password and Mobile OTP tabs with data-testid attributes. Password login (admin@asr123) successfully redirects to dashboard.

minor.issue: User provided password '131993' doesn't work - actual default password is 'admin@asr123'. This may be user documentation error, not a code bug.

action_items: INFORMATION: Admin password is 'admin@asr123', not '131993' as specified in test request
critical_code_review_comments: AdminLogin.js lines 24-85: OTP verification handler properly extracts mobile from MSG91 event detail and calls backend API with cleanMobile. React closure issue was fixed by including mobile in event dispatch.
StaffLogin.js lines 23-84: Same fix pattern applied - stores mobile in event detail for callback access.
server.py lines 3296-3367: /api/admin/login-otp endpoint properly handles mobile validation, country code stripping, admin mobile check (8877896889), and staff lookup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: OTP login fix verified. Backend API works correctly. MSG91 widget cannot be fully automated in testing (third-party popup). Password login works with email 'asrenterprisespatna@gmail.com' and password 'admin@asr123'. Mobile OTP login works with mobile '8877896889'.

ui_tests.password_login_flow: Successfully logged in and redirected to dashboard

msg91_otp_verification_note: MSG91 OTP widget verification is a third-party popup that cannot be fully automated. The fix was verified by testing the backend API directly (POST /api/admin/login-otp) and verifying the frontend code correctly handles the OTP success callback.
